path: cd /workspaces/chateaudelesigny; rm -rf dist; npm run build 2>&1 | grep -iE 'error|warn|redirect|complete|built|page\(s\)' | head -30

cd /tmp/claude-1000/-workspaces-chateaudelesigny/f43830f5-3bfb-4e88-b7bd-517d856c992e/scratchpad
for t in "Louis XIII" "Marie de' Medici" "Concino Concini" "Catherine de' Medici" "Charles d'Albert, Duke of Luynes"; do
  url=$(curl -s "https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&titles=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse,sys;print(urllib.parse.quote(sys.argv[1]))" "$t")&prop=pageimages&piprop=original&format=json" -A "lesigny-site/1.0" | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);p=list(d['query']['pages'].values())[0];print(p.get('original',{}).get('source',''))")
  echo "$t => $url"
done
